positive: A highly stylized, elegant illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a group of anthropomorphic woodland animals (foxes, rabbits, owls) gathered around glowing, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. Use a deep indigo and emerald green color palette with pops of warm gold light from the mushrooms, creating strong contrast and mystical atmosphere. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, suitable for an apparel graphic. The style must be flat vector illustration mixed with delicate watercolor textures, giving it a sophisticated, clean silhouette feel, perfect for screen printing. High detail, crisp lines, magical realism.
